# Maintenance Pull Request

## Pull Request Type

Repository maintenance

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one repository concern.
- [ ] GitHub templates remain aligned with repository workflow instructions.
- [ ] Tooling or CI changes include validation notes or expected CI coverage.
- [ ] No credentials, private URLs, or local-only paths were added.
